# Footprints Dynasty

> Footprints Dynasty preserves African family history and heritage through education, technology, and cultural projects.

Footprints Dynasty is a Nigerian-founded organization focused on African heritage, family history, cultural preservation, and education technology (EdTech). The site shares stories, hosts events, and showcases services and innovations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of mission, services, events, innovations
- [About](/about): Mission, history, and team
- [Services](/services): Heritage, education, cultural services
- [Innovations](/innovations): Tools and projects
- [Events](/events): Upcoming and past events
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos and visuals
- [Blog](/blog): Stories on EdTech, heritage, African history
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch

## Optional

- [Apply](/apply): Job application form
